sections.paragraph:
Original: יפוא יפו

Transliteration: yâphô yâphô'

Phonetic: yaw-fo'

BDB Definition:

Joppa or Japho = "beautiful"
  1. a town on the southwest coast of Palestine in the territory of Dan; became primary port of Jerusalem during reign of Solomon

Origin: from H3302

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
